componentDescription: A component for managing and reordering a list of items using drag-and-drop interactions.

items.description: An array of items to be rendered and managed by the drag-and-drop component.

onChange.description: Callback function invoked when the order of items changes, providing the updated array of items.

renderItem.description: A function to customize how each item in the list is rendered, receiving the item data and its index. If not provided, the raw item data will be rendered.

containerProps.description: Optional props to be applied to the main container element of the drag-and-drop component.

itemProps.description: Optional props to be applied to each individual draggable item's container.

draggedIndex.description: The index of the item currently being dragged, or null if no item is being dragged.

itemRefs.description: A mutable ref object to store references to the DOM elements of each draggable item for position tracking.

handleDragStart.description: Function to initiate the drag operation, triggered by mouse or touch events, and identifies the item by its index.

views.description: Optional props to be applied to various sub-views within the component.

themeMode.description: The theme mode for the component, inherited from ViewProps.
